use_cases: Displaying cashback partner listings in a responsive card grid layout
Showcasing affiliate or loyalty program partners on e-commerce platforms
Presenting fintech partner offers with animated entry effects
Building partner directories with hover-interactive elements
ai_summary: A responsive card component designed to showcase cashback partners in an animated grid layout. Features staggered entrance animations using Framer Motion, hover states on interactive elements, and a clean minimalist design with standard card styling. Adaptable for e-commerce, fintech, or any partner/affiliate program display needs.
